summary: Phase 2 Testing Complete - Saved Views CRUD and Calendar View features fully functional. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 minor edge case: setting due_date to null not working). Frontend: All features verified working including CalendarView rendering, order events on calendar, week/month views, and Saved Views save/load/pin/delete.

minor.issue: Cannot set due_date to null/empty - the field is filtered out when value is None. This is edge case only; drag & drop always sets new dates.

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/saved-views returns list for authenticated user
BACKEND: POST /api/saved-views creates new saved view with name, board, filters, pinned
BACKEND: POST /api/saved-views with pinned=true creates pinned view
BACKEND: PUT /api/saved-views/{view_id} updates pinned status
BACKEND: PUT /api/saved-views/{view_id} updates name
BACKEND: DELETE /api/saved-views/{view_id} removes view from database
BACKEND: Saved views endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
BACKEND: POST /api/orders creates order with due_date field
BACKEND: PUT /api/orders/{order_id} can update due_date (for calendar drag & drop)
BACKEND: GET /api/orders returns orders with due_date field
BACKEND: GET /api/orders?board=SCHEDULING filters by board correctly
FRONTEND: 'General' button visible in saved views tab area
FRONTEND: Table/Calendar toggle buttons visible on SCHEDULING board only
FRONTEND: Clicking Calendar toggle renders CalendarView with data-testid='calendar-view'
FRONTEND: Calendar shows month title (MARZO 2026)
FRONTEND: 'Hoy' button visible for returning to current date
FRONTEND: Week/Month toggle buttons visible and functional
FRONTEND: Order with due_date appears on correct calendar date
FRONTEND: Order event color matches priority (RUSH = red)
FRONTEND: 'Guardar vista' button appears when filters are active
FRONTEND: Saving view creates new saved view button
FRONTEND: Saved view persists and appears in tab area
FRONTEND: Toast notification confirms view save
FRONTEND: 'Limpiar' link clears active filters
critical_code_review_comments: SavedViews backend (server.py lines 891-954): Clean CRUD implementation with proper user_id filtering
CalendarView component: Uses date-fns for date handling, supports month/week views, draggable order events
Dashboard.js lines 1594-1763: savedViews state, fetchSavedViews, handleSaveView, handleApplyView, handleTogglePinView, handleDeleteView properly implemented
Dashboard.js lines 2233-2243: Calendar toggle only shows when currentBoard === 'SCHEDULING'
Dashboard.js lines 2296-2301: Conditional CalendarView rendering based on calendarMode state
seed_data_creation: Backend tests auto-create and cleanup test data (TEST_Phase2_*, TEST_CAL_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features all verified: 1) Saved Views: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints work, views are scoped per user_id and per board, pinned views appear first in UI. 2) Calendar View: CalendarView component renders when calendarMode=true and board=SCHEDULING, shows order events on due_date, supports drag&drop (uses PUT /api/orders to update due_date), week/month views work. Minor edge case: backend filters None values so cannot clear due_date to null (low priority). Saved views created during test: PW_Test_View. Test order created: CAL_TEST_001 with due_date=2026-03-15.

endpoints: GET /api/saved-views - Returns views for current user
POST /api/saved-views - Creates view with {name, board, filters, pinned}

saved_views_frontend.unpinned_views: Button shows name, hover reveals pin/delete actions

mocked_apis.email: Resend email still MOCKED (no API key configured)
mocked_apis.slack: Slack webhook still MOCKED (no URL configured)
